ddls:
CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the topic belongs */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the topic (e.g., open, closed, pending review) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the topic has received */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies the topic has received */,
  "last_reply_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last reply */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the topic is sticky */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic that this reply belongs to */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reply was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the reply */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the reply has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the reply has received */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the reply has been edited */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last edit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is banned */,
  "ban_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ban, if applicable */,
  "ban_expiration" TEXT /* Date and time when the ban expires, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is archived */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual differentiation in the UI */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic being voted on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., created topic, replied, voted) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic related to the activity, if applicable */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply related to the activity, if applicable */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity, if necessary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
